title: Soccer: HoZKINZPooP beats the JiggyWiggy challenge.
description: Round 3 with Hoz. K, so, pissed off at my vegas. It's starting to crash on me for no reason. This better not be a permanent thing cause making ytpmv's is frustrating when you have to keep doing it over and saving every time I do something. Shift pitching is terrible because of that reason but i hope you still likez it. :3 Hoz can now use any attack of the show or any banjo tooie song.
